description: CLI tool to convert Linear issues to executable PRDs with task tracking and bidirectional sync

tasks.description: Define PRD JSON schema and Linear issue template
steps: Create scripts/templates/ directory structure
Define prd-schema.json with: project, linearIssueId, tasks[], decisions{}, target_stack[]
Task schema: id, phase, mode (hitl|afk), category, description, steps[], passes, error?
Create linear-issue.md template with sections: Overview, Acceptance Criteria, Technical Notes, Sub-tasks
Add JSON schema $id and validation keywords

tasks.description: Set up CLI project structure with Commander
steps: Initialize scripts/package.json with typescript, commander, zod dependencies
Configure tsconfig.json for ESM output
Create src/index.ts with commander program setup
Add bin entry point in package.json
Add prd command with subcommands: pull, run, sync, status
Create src/types.ts with PRD, Task, LinearIssue interfaces
Create src/utils/file.ts for PRD file read/write operations
Create src/utils/linear.ts stub for MCP interactions
Add Zod schemas for runtime validation of PRD files
Export all types from src/index.ts

tasks.description: Implement Linear MCP client for fetching issues
steps: Create src/linear/client.ts using mcp__linear__get_issue
Parse issue fields: title, description, labels, assignee, state
Extract acceptance criteria from description (checkbox pattern)
Fetch sub-issues using mcp__linear__list_issues with parentId filter
Return structured LinearIssue object with sub-tasks

tasks.description: Implement PRD generation from Linear issue
steps: Create src/commands/pull.ts command handler
Parse acceptance criteria into task candidates
Group tasks into phases based on keywords (setup, implement, test, etc.)
Assign mode (hitl/afk) based on task complexity heuristics
Generate task steps from acceptance criteria text
Write PRD JSON to scripts/prds/{issue-id}-prd.json
Output success message with file path
Create src/commands/run.ts command handler
Load and validate PRD file from path argument
Filter tasks by passes=false for pending work
For each task: spawn claude-code CLI with task prompt
Capture stdout/stderr and exit code
Update task.passes and task.error in PRD file after each task
Handle Ctrl+C gracefully, saving progress
Add --interactive / -i flag to run command
Before each task: display task description and steps
Prompt user: [r]un / [s]kip / [q]uit
On 'skip': mark task skipped, continue to next
On 'quit': save progress and exit
Use readline for interactive prompts

tasks.description: Implement HITL vs AFK mode handling
steps: Add --mode flag to run command (hitl|afk|auto)
In auto mode: respect task.mode setting
In hitl mode: always prompt for confirmation
In afk mode: skip confirmation, run all tasks
Pass appropriate flags to claude-code CLI based on mode

tasks.description: Implement Linear sync for progress updates
steps: Create src/commands/sync.ts command handler
Calculate completion percentage from tasks
Update Linear issue status via mcp__linear__update_issue
Map completion to states: 0%=In Progress, 100%=Done
Create/update Linear Document with PRD content via mcp__linear__create_document or mcp__linear__update_document
Add completion summary comment via mcp__linear__create_comment
Create src/commands/status.ts command handler
Load PRD file and calculate stats
Display: completion %, pending count, in-progress, completed
List blockers (tasks with errors)
Format output with colors using chalk
Show task breakdown by phase

tasks.description: Add error handling and retry logic
steps: Wrap all MCP calls in try/catch with meaningful errors
Add --retry flag to run command
On retry: re-run tasks where passes=false and error exists
Add exponential backoff for MCP rate limits
Validate PRD file exists before operations
Add --verbose / -v flag to all commands
Log MCP requests/responses in verbose mode
Add timestamps to execution logs
Create src/utils/logger.ts with log levels
Color-code output: green=success, red=error, yellow=warning

tasks.description: Add unit tests for core utilities
steps: Set up vitest in scripts/package.json
Test PRD file read/write operations
Test task filtering and status calculation
Test acceptance criteria parsing
Test phase grouping logic

tasks.description: Manual integration test with real Linear issue
steps: Create test Linear issue with acceptance criteria
Run prd pull on test issue
Verify PRD JSON structure and content
Run prd run --interactive on generated PRD
Run prd sync and verify Linear updates
Run prd status and verify output
Create scripts/README.md with usage examples
Document all CLI commands and flags
Add examples for pull, run, sync, status
Update root CLAUDE.md with PRD CLI section
Verify pnpm prd commands work from scripts/
